scripts.build:mas: tsc && VITE_APP_STORE=true vite build && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.appstore.conf.json --features appstore --bundles app && xattr -c src-tauri/embedded.provisionprofile && xattr -cr src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.app && mkdir -p src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.app/Contents/Resources/zh.lproj && touch src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.app/Contents/Resources/zh.lproj/Localizable.strings && mkdir -p src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.app/Contents/Resources/en.lproj && touch src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.app/Contents/Resources/en.lproj/Localizable.strings && codesign --force --options runtime --sign "3rd Party Mac Developer Application: li tan (UKK3BUGG85)" --entitlements src-tauri/entitlements.plist --identifier "ink.ainx.hylo.editor.v2" src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.app/Contents/MacOS/tauri-app && codesign --force --options runtime --sign "3rd Party Mac Developer Application: li tan (UKK3BUGG85)" --entitlements src-tauri/entitlements.plist --identifier "ink.ainx.hylo.editor.v2" src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.app && productbuild --sign "3rd Party Mac Developer Installer: li tan (UKK3BUGG85)" --component "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.app" /Applications "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Hylo.pkg"
